description_long: This house features a simple, boxy structure with a flat roof and minimal exterior ornamentation. The facade is largely unadorned, with a few small, rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the walls. The building appears to be constructed primarily from concrete or a similar solid material, giving it a modern, utilitarian appearance. The entryway is subtle and integrated into the main volume, lacking a prominent porch or decorative elements. The overall design emphasizes function over form, with clean lines and a compact footprint. The color is a uniform light gray, contributing to its understated, contemporary look.
description: A compact, modern house with a flat roof, light gray exterior, and minimal window openings. The design is boxy and utilitarian, with clean lines and little ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade with a small window and the entryway, highlighting the flat roof and boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the staggered depth of the structure and additional small windows, emphasizing the building's layered form.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more window placements and the extended section of the house, maintaining the flat roof and minimal detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the stepped profile and window arrangement, reinforcing the modern, functional design.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist entryway integrated into the main facade, no porch or decorative elements
